title: Add release workflow for tag-triggered binary publishing
description:
Add .github/workflows/release.yml that triggers on git tag push (v*) and produces release artifacts: CLI binaries for linux/macos/windows on amd64+arm64 (6 binaries) plus the wasm32-freestanding artifact. Cross-compile from a single ubuntu-latest runner using zig. Publish all artifacts to a GitHub Release.

Acceptance:
- Workflow triggers on tags matching v*
- Produces 6 CLI archives (linux-amd64, linux-arm64, macos-amd64, macos-arm64, windows-amd64, windows-arm64)
- Produces sideshowdb.wasm
- Creates GitHub release attached with all artifacts
- Uses Zig 0.16.0 to match CI
close_reason: Release workflow merged in #5 and validated by tag v0.0.1-alpha01: 6 CLI archives + wasm + SHA256SUMS published; ubi install verified end-to-end on macos-arm64.

title: Fix PR CI and split workflow jobs
description: Bring the CI workflow split and caching improvements onto the document PR branch, fix formatting drift reported by GitHub Actions, and push until PR #3 is green.

title: Implement namespaced versioned document read/write slice
description: Implement the first public document slice over Git refs: add a namespaced, versioned DocumentStore over RefStore, expose doc put/get via the CLI and host-backed WASM surface, add EARS requirements, and cover latest/versioned retrieval with tests.

title: MVP: git ref storage abstraction + impl
description: Implement first concept from spec — controlled-section storage backed by a git ref. Add a RefStore trait-style abstraction (zig vtable pattern modeled on std.mem.Allocator) plus a GitRefStore implementation that drives git plumbing (hash-object, mktree/write-tree, commit-tree, update-ref) via subprocess. Ship a spec doc explaining the storage model and embedding a zig-trait-vs-Scala-3-trait primer for the project author. Tests run against a real ephemeral git repo.
design: Ref namespace refs/sideshowdb/<section>; tree under ref holds blobs keyed by path. Writes use a private temp index file so we never touch the working index. Subprocess-based for MVP — libgit2/zig-native parsing is later work.
acceptance_criteria: Spec doc lands at docs/development/specs/git-ref-storage-spec.md; RefStore + GitRefStore compile; integration test creates temp repo, puts a key, reads it back, lists keys, deletes, and verifies via raw git plumbing; zig build / zig build test green
close_reason: RefStore abstraction + GitRefStore impl shipped. Spec at docs/development/specs/git-ref-storage-spec.md includes Zig-vs-Scala-3 trait primer. 9/9 tests pass including end-to-end git plumbing roundtrip.

title: Bootstrap multi-module zig project skeleton
description: Initial scaffolding for sideshowdb in zig 0.16. Provide core library module, native CLI executable, and wasm32-freestanding library target. No spec implementation yet — only build wiring, module graph, hello-world entrypoints, and tests scaffolding.
design: Single build.zig defines: (1) core module exported via b.addModule; (2) cli exe linking core; (3) wasm static lib with wasm32-freestanding target linking core; (4) test step covering core
acceptance_criteria: zig build succeeds; zig build test passes; zig build wasm produces wasm artifact; zig build run prints sideshowdb banner
close_reason: Multi-module skeleton landed: core lib, native CLI, wasm32-freestanding client, integration tests. zig build / test / wasm / run all green.

title: Split CI format and link checks into separate jobs
description: Adjust the GitHub Actions CI workflow so formatting and link validation run in their own jobs instead of being bundled into a single job.
close_reason: Completed by PR #3 under follow-up task sideshowdb-kin

title: Extend document slice with list/delete/history operations
description: Follow the initial namespaced, versioned document read/write slice by adding document list, delete, and version-history traversal semantics across DocumentStore, CLI, and WASM.

title: Evaluate ziggit backend and host integration for document refs
description: Prototype or evaluate a non-subprocess document ref backend using ziggit and tighten the WASM host integration contract for version-aware latest reads and writes.

title: Address PR feedback on VersionId alias
description: Respond to PR #3 feedback by introducing a VersionId alias in the RefStore seam and propagating it through implementations without changing behavior.

title: Deduplicate CLI usage handling
description: Refactor the CLI app to use a shared usage message/helper and ensure malformed argument paths return the same usage failure output.
